title: City's living costs drive workers to food banks
summary: Cambridge's high living costs are forcing employed residents to rely on food bank support, according to local charity assessments. This highlights growing affordability challenges even for working people.
content: It is so expensive to live in Cambridge a charity says people with jobs need subsidised food.

zh.title: 城市生活成本推动工人依靠食物银行
zh.summary: 剑桥高昂的生活成本正迫使在职居民依赖食物银行支持，据当地慈善机构评估。这突显了即使是在职人群也面临越来越严峻的可负担性挑战。

title: 'Six eggs used to be £1' - why everyday essentials cost so much more now
summary: Supermarket prices for everyday items like eggs have surged since 2022, when a six-pack cost £1. The article examines what's driving these increases and whether retailers are profiteering.
content: Six supermarket brand eggs cost £1 in 2022. How much are they now, why have they gone up, and is anyone profiteering?

zh.title: "六个鸡蛋曾经只要1英镑" - 为什么日常必需品现在贵这么多
zh.summary: 自2022年以来，超市日常商品（如鸡蛋）的价格大幅上涨，当时六个一盒的鸡蛋只需1英镑。该文章探讨了推动这些价格上涨的因素，以及零售商是否在抬价。

title: Secret Service shoots person near White House, bystander also shot, law enforcement official says
summary: Secret Service reported shots fired one block from the White House near 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue NW, with at least one person and a bystander shot. The incident occurred during what appears to be a security situation at the nation's capital.
content: Secret Service said it was "aware of reports of shots fired near 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue NW" — one block from the White House.

zh.title: 特勤局在白宫附近开枪打伤一人，执法官员称旁观者也中枪
zh.summary: 特勤局报告称在白宫附近一个街区（宾夕法尼亚大道西北17街附近）发生枪声，至少有一人和一名旁观者中枪。这次事件发生在美国首都的一场安全状况期间。
